mapper.select: select count(*) from shift_exchange where (student_id_a = #{studentId} or student_id_b = #{studentId}) and status = '1' and DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
mapper.insert: insert into shift_exchange (student_id_a, student_name_a, student_id_b, student_name_b, venue_id, duty_id, exchange_reason, status, student_b_confirm, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentIdA}, #{studentNameA}, #{studentIdB}, #{studentNameB}, #{venueId}, #{dutyId}, #{exchangeReason}, #{status}, #{studentBConfirm}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select exchange_id, student_id_a, student_name_a, student_id_b, student_name_b, venue_id, duty_id, exchange_reason, status, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, student_b_confirm, student_b_confirm_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, created_at, updated_at from shift_exchange where exchange_id = #{exchangeId}

select 'swap' as application_type, se.exchange_id as id, se.duty_id, se.student_id_a as student_id, se.student_name_a as student_name, se.student_id_b as related_student_id, se.student_name_b as related_student_name, se.venue_id, v.venue_name, ds.start_time, ds.end_time, se.exchange_reason as reason, null as proof_image, case se.status when '0' then 'pending' when '3' then 'pending' when '1' then 'approved' when '2' then 'rejected' when '4' then 'cancelled' else se.status end as status, se.status as status_code, se.approve_time, se.approve_remark, se.cancel_time, se.cancel_reason, se.created_at from shift_exchange se left join duty_schedule ds on se.duty_id = ds.duty_id left join venue v on se.venue_id = v.venue_id where se.exchange_id = #{exchangeId} and se.student_id_a = #{studentId}
